name: Tarragon Potato Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the Miracle Whip, sour cream, chopped tarragon, salt, and pepper in a large bowl until well combined.
2. Add the cubed cooked potatoes and sliced green onions to the mixture.
3. Gently mix all ingredients together.
4. Refrigerate until ready to serve. Makes 8 servings.
